name: Document360 Knowledge Base API
what_it_does: Document360 REST API for knowledge base and documentation platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage articles, retrieve documentation content, manage categories and projects, access analytics on article performance, and integrate Document360 content into customer support and product workflows. Document360 supports both customer-facing help centers and internal knowledge bases.
use_cases: Creating and updating documentation articles from technical writing agents
Retrieving help center content for customer support AI deflection agents
Managing knowledge base categories and projects from content operations agents
Integrating Document360 documentation into chatbot and support workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise wikis with complex collaborative editing needs
best_when: A SaaS company using Document360 wants AI agents to manage documentation, retrieve help content for support deflection, and integrate knowledge base data into chatbot workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Internal knowledge base content may be confidential. Management API key provides full write access to all documentation.

auth.notes: Document360 API uses API key passed as `api_token` header. Project-level and account-level API keys available in Document360 dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 1 project, limited articles and team members
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard, Professional, Business, and Enterprise plans scaling articles, team members, and features
pricing.notes: Indian SaaS company with competitive global pricing. API access on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact Document360 for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
API key required in custom header (api_token) — check header naming in documentation
Separate project-level and account-level API keys have different permissions
API documentation is well-structured for a mid-tier platform
Content is stored in HTML/Markdown — handle formatting when ingesting or updating
agent_readiness.security_notes: Internal documentation may be confidential. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth with custom header. EU data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Documentation content may be confidential. SOC2, GDPR. API key in custom header.
